since_last: 39% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.75%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 39% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC -0.90% · Gold -0.18% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 39% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.75%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.75%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.31%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -6.99%
cards.body: Leaders: NVT +3.25%, BIDU +2.30%, WDAY +1.91%, AVAV +1.64%, INTU +1.54%. Laggards: SKHY -6.99%, MU -4.92%, TER -4.64%, TSM -4.25%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.17% at $135.04
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.17% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
